title: sida subdensiflora
intro: Sida subdensiflora, also known as the slender fanpetals or fan petal, is a flowering plant species in the mallow family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sida subdensiflora include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function. Sida subdensiflora is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and salves.
